lines: I need a book that explains real history events
Something informative with true details
Can you suggest any book?.
I want a book about science and discoveries
Something that teaches me real knowledge
Can you suggest any book?.
I want a book full of magic and mythical creatures
Something that takes me to another world
Can you suggest any book?.
Give me a book with dragons and epic battles
Something adventurous with enchanted lands
Can you suggest any book?.
I want a story about a mysterious murder case
Something with detectives solving puzzles
Can you suggest any book?.
Give me a book full of suspense and criminal plots
I like stories where justice is served
Can you suggest any book?.
I’m looking for a book about family struggles
Something emotional with deep characters
Can you suggest any book?.
I want a book that explores love and heartbreak
Something that feels realistic and touching
Can you suggest any book?.
